---
title: "claude-code-field-guide"
date: '2026-03-20'
categories: [project, AI, claude code, tools]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/claude-code-field-guide"
project_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/claude-code-field-guide"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/claude-code-field-guide"
stars: 5
project_lang: ""
---

My best practices, favorite skills, plugins, tools and MCPs for Claude Code. A living document of what actually works when building with agentic coding tools.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/claude-code-field-guide)
